overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city street, entering a restricted construction area with metal fencing, climbing to an elevated industrial platform to overlook the street, then returning to sidewalk level to continue through the bustling urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon signage and traffic

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the city sidewalk passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in white top and bright pink pants walking past the camera
pedestrian in neon green pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive futuristic building with green NC logo and layered architecture with neon accents
orange metal traffic barriers separating sidewalk from the street
tall black metal security fence with barbed wire topping
futuristic cars and trucks driving on the multi-lane street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a bustling futuristic city sidewalk with the iconic NC tower visible ahead. Orange traffic barriers line the street where futuristic vehicles drive by, while pedestrians in cyberpunk fashion walk past. A tall black security fence runs along the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: restricted construction corridor between high metal fences

events.description: turns right entering a narrow fenced-off corridor between security barriers

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow restricted passage flanked by high metal fences on both sides

entered.detail: red and white striped plastic construction barriers blocking off the area
metal chain-link gate at the end of the corridor leading to upper level

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed corridor between tall black security fences, leaving the busy street behind. The space is restricted with construction barriers visible, leading toward a chain-link gate at the end. The NC tower remains visible in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial platform with HVAC equipment overlooking the street

events.description: passes through chain-link gate onto an elevated industrial platform
approaches platform edge and looks down at the street level below
turns around to exit the elevated platform back toward the gate

agents.ego_description: traversing the elevated industrial platform, looking down over the edge at the street below, then turning to leave

entered.detail: large metal ventilation pipes and industrial ductwork
industrial HVAC units and machinery on the rooftop platform
view looking down at the street and traffic from the elevated height

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an elevated industrial platform surrounded by HVAC equipment and large ventilation pipes. They walk to the edge to look down at the street below, then turn around to head back. The NC tower looms prominently on the left side of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy futuristic city street with pedestrian traffic and vehicles

events.description: exits the restricted fenced area back onto the main city sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk observing the futuristic city traffic and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in military-style clothing with tattoos walking past the camera

entered.detail: orange metal traffic barriers along the edge of the street
futuristic cars and military-style vehicles driving on the road

segments.scene_description: The character exits the restricted area and returns to the bustling city sidewalk, rejoining the flow of pedestrians. Futuristic vehicles drive past on the left while the massive NC tower dominates the view ahead. The character continues walking through the vibrant cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling futuristic sidewalk into a restricted industrial zone and back again. It begins by moving past pedestrians and orange traffic barriers along a vibrant city street with the NC tower looming in the distance. As the camera turns, the open urban environment narrows into a restricted corridor enclosed by tall black security fences and construction barriers. The scene then opens up onto an elevated industrial platform filled with HVAC equipment and ventilation pipes, offering a brief overlook of the street below before the camera turns back. Finally, the view shifts back to the sidewalk level, rejoining the flow of futuristic vehicles and pedestrians as the character continues forward under the dominating presence of the NC tower.
